text: Prime delivery is incredible — ordered at 10pm, arrived next morning. The app is easy to use and product quality has been consistent. Returns are straightforward. Best e-commerce experience overall.
Delivery speed is great but customer support is hit or miss. Had an issue with a wrong item and it took 3 days to get a response. Return process was easy though.
We use Amazon Business for supplies. Pricing is competitive, delivery is fast. The interface could be simpler for bulk orders. Support has improved over the past year.
Shopify made it easy to launch our store. The platform is intuitive, themes are beautiful, and the app ecosystem is rich. Support team was helpful during setup. Pricing is fair for what you get.
We migrated from WooCommerce and haven't looked back. Better reliability, cleaner UX. Transaction fees add up but the platform quality justifies it. Would like more built-in analytics.
Best place for unique and vintage items. Pricing is often better than Amazon for used goods. Seller protection could be stronger. Customer support wait times are long.
Got a counterfeit item. Return process was a nightmare — had to escalate twice. Support was unhelpful. Good for buying, terrible when things go wrong.
Third-party sellers are a gamble. Got defective electronics twice. Amazon refunded but the process was frustrating. Stick to sold-by-Amazon when possible.
Good platform but pricing tiers feel restrictive. Need to upgrade for basic features. Support is good. Would recommend for new stores.
Found a rare collectible at a fair price. Seller was professional. Shipping was fast. eBay's buyer protection gives peace of mind.
Subscribe and Save saves us money on household items. Delivery is reliable. Wish there was better filtering for quality on third-party items.
Launched our store in a weekend. Themes, checkout, payments — all seamless. Support helped with a custom integration. Best e-commerce platform for SMBs.
Good for auctions and used items. Interface feels dated. Seller fees are high. Customer support is slow. Still the best for certain categories.
Prime Video and Music are nice bonuses. Overall ecosystem is strong. Would like better support for complex issues.
Scaled from 100 to 10K orders/month on Shopify. Platform held up well. Some app costs add up. Recommend for growing brands.
Sold old electronics easily. Fees are transparent. Buyer paid quickly. Good marketplace for both buying and selling.
Alexa integration for reordering is handy. Whole ecosystem works well together. Best overall e-commerce experience.
Multiple sales channels in one place. Inventory sync works well. Would like better reporting out of the box.
Seller never shipped. Dispute process took 3 weeks. Got refund eventually but poor experience. Buyer protection exists but is slow.
Best selection and fastest delivery. Prime pays for itself. Product quality varies by seller but Amazon's return policy protects buyers.
